evidence_quotes.quote: The long-standing and constant presence of banners, every moment of a user’s web experience, is a profound inconvenience
the incorrect use of permit management buttons in cookie banners
facilitated and integrated management of cookies
a dedicated function that allows the user to select one and only once their preferences to be applied to all websites and service providers

paragraphs.text: To the European Commission, this legislative act should, in my view, cover the facilitated and integrated management of cookies: ensure that this is covered by GDPR protections and that browsers need to have a dedicated function that allows the user to select one and only once their preferences to be applied to all websites and service providers. The long-standing and constant presence of banners, every moment of a user’s web experience, is a profound inconvenience which, together with the incorrect use of permit management buttons in cookie banners, should also be greatly simplified by adopting the above suggestions. Thank you for your attention and good work, Tobia Invernizzi Martini
